# Fixture README (reconciling)

SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE for `scripts/tests/test_validator.py`. Stands in for the
real README when exercising the D43 map-matches-territory checks against a
pretend disk count of 5 skills.

The <!-- SKILL-COUNT -->5<!-- /SKILL-COUNT --> skills sit in
<!-- FAMILY-COUNT -->2<!-- /FAMILY-COUNT --> discipline families.

## What's in the library

1. **Alpha discipline** *(Phase 1, 2)* — two pretend skills.
2. **Beta discipline** *(Phase 2, 2)* — two pretend skills.

Family counts sum to 4, plus the one orchestrator front door = 5 = the marked
SKILL-COUNT and the pretend disk count.

## The roles Aegis can play

Presence-only section; the validator warns if it is absent.
